_meta.scenario: In-between user: 3 completed courses, usage_confidence=0.6. All three scorers are active. Weight distribution: survey=0.446 (base 0.35 + 0.096 redistributed), usage=0.24 (0.40 * 0.6), work_context=0.314 (base 0.25 + 0.064 redistributed). This shows the continuous cold-start blend mid-transition.
_meta.interpretation: Notice that work_context still contributes heavily (0.314 effective weight vs usage at 0.24) because usage_confidence is only 60%. The top recommendation combines all three signals with a visible contribution from each — the hallmark of a 'blended' mid-journey user. The score breakdown proves no single signal is dominating.
